# Vivere Ex Animo - E-commerce Store

## Project Overview
E-commerce platform for Vivere Ex Animo clothing brand built with Next.js 14+ and TypeScript.

## Tech Stack
- **Frontend**: Next.js 14+ (App Router), React, TypeScript
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS
- **State Management**: TBD (Zustand)
- **Database**: TBD (PostgreSQL with Prisma ORM)
- **Authentication**: TBD (NextAuth.js)
- **Payments**: TBD (Stripe/MercadoPago)
- **Image Management**: TBD (Cloudinary)
- **Deployment**: Vercel

## Project Structure
- `/app` - Next.js App Router pages
- `/components` - React components (ui, layout)
- `/lib` - Utilities, API clients
- `/public` - Static assets

## Development Status
✅ Project structure created
✅ Next.js & TypeScript configured
✅ Tailwind CSS configured
✅ Basic layout (Navbar, Footer)
✅ Basic UI components (Button, Input)
⏳ Pages construction starting from scratch
⏳ Component implementation step by step

## Design Guidelines
- Color Scheme: Primary Red (#ef4444), Black, White, Grays
- Typography: Inter font
- Mobile-first responsive design
- Modern, clean, minimalist aesthetic

## Current Focus
Building the visual design and user interface step by step, component by component.
